L

Lens<S,O> - Class in fun.optic
A Lens is an optic that can be seen as a pair of functions: - get: S => O i.e. from an S, we can extract an O - set: (O, S) => S i.e. from an S and a O, we obtain a S. Unless a prism, to go back to S we need another S. Typically, a Lens can be defined between a Product (e.g. record, tuple) and one of its component.
Lens(Function<S, O>, Function<O, Function<S, S>>) - Constructor for class fun.optic.Lens
 
letter - Static variable in class fun.gen.CharGen
Generates a letter from a-z

Generates a letter from a-z
